PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Teri Fowler appeared for and with Paul Proom and Ronald Coulter (Co-Petitioners). David Owens appeared for and with Beth Hanson (Nominee of Charles Cogdell).

Both Counsel presented oral arguements. The Court stated that under the law the Court has to appoint the nominee of the heir at law. Therefore, the Court appointed Beth Hanson as administrator of the estate. The bond is fixed at $371,843.00. The order was signed in open court. Mr. Coulter asked for clarification regarding the disinheritance issue. The Court informed Mr. Coulter that it was beyond the scope of this petition and that it could not be addressed.

Judge: Herbert Donaldson. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth CSR#5162. Bailiff: O. Arias. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
